mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_privacy_policy WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_privacy_policy (user_id, policy_json) VALUES (#{userId}, #{policyJson}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE policy_json = VALUES(policy_json)
mapper.sql: b.id, b.user_id, b.blocked_user_id, b.flags_json, b.block_ip, b.memo, b.masked_label, b.created_at, b.updated_at, u.name AS blocked_user_name, u.email AS blocked_user_email, u.status AS blocked_user_status
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_block b JOIN users u ON u.id = b.blocked_user_id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
SELECT FROM user_block b JOIN users u ON u.id = b.blocked_user_id WHERE b.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_block (user_id, blocked_user_id, flags_json, block_ip, memo, masked_label) VALUES (#{userId}, #{blockedUserId}, #{flagsJson}, #{blockIp}, #{memo}, #{maskedLabel})
mapper.select: SELECT p.user_id, p.is_anonymous AS anonymous FROM community_post p WHERE p.id = #{postId} AND p.status != 'DELETED'
SELECT c.user_id, c.is_anonymous AS anonymous FROM community_comment c WHERE c.id = #{commentId} AND c.status != 'DELETED'

SELECT b.*, s.name AS source_user_name, s.status AS source_user_status, ub.masked_label AS source_masked_label FROM user_ip_block b LEFT JOIN users s ON s.id = b.source_user_id LEFT JOIN user_block ub ON ub.user_id = b.user_id AND ub.blocked_user_id = b.source_user_id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_ip_block (user_id, ip_hash, source_user_id, label) VALUES (#{userId}, #{ipHash}, #{sourceUserId}, #{label}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE label = VALUES(label)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_ip_block WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
DELETE FROM user_ip_block WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_user_id = #{sourceUserId}
mapper.select: SELECT SHA2(CONCAT(#{salt}, h.ip_address), 256) FROM user_login_history h WHERE h.user_id = #{userId} AND h.success = 1 AND h.ip_address IS NOT NULL ORDER BY h.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_ip_block b WHERE b.user_id = #{viewerId} AND b.ip_hash = ( SELECT SHA2(CONCAT(#{salt}, h.ip_address), 256) FROM user_login_history h WHERE h.user_id = #{actorId} AND h.success = 1 AND h.ip_address IS NOT NULL ORDER BY h.id DESC LIMIT 1 )

SELECT lh.user_id FROM ( SELECT h.user_id, SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(h.ip_address ORDER BY h.id DESC SEPARATOR ','), ',', 1) AS latest_ip FROM user_login_history h WHERE h.success = 1 AND h.ip_address IS NOT NULL AND h.user_id IN #{targetId} GROUP BY h.user_id ) lh JOIN user_ip_block b ON b.user_id = #{viewerId} AND b.ip_hash = SHA2(CONCAT(#{salt}, lh.latest_ip), 256)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT lh.user_id) FROM ( SELECT h.user_id, SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(h.ip_address ORDER BY h.id DESC SEPARATOR ','), ',', 1) AS latest_ip FROM user_login_history h WHERE h.success = 1 AND h.ip_address IS NOT NULL GROUP BY h.user_id ) lh WHERE SHA2(CONCAT(#{salt}, lh.latest_ip), 256) = #{ipHash}
mapper.sql: cb.id, cb.user_id, cb.conversation_id, cb.flags_json, cb.created_at, cb.updated_at, c.title AS conversation_title, c.type AS conversation_type
mapper.select: SELECT FROM conversation_block cb JOIN collaboration_conversation c ON c.id = cb.conversation_id WHERE cb.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY cb.created_at DESC
SELECT FROM conversation_block cb JOIN collaboration_conversation c ON c.id = cb.conversation_id WHERE cb.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO conversation_block (user_id, conversation_id, flags_json) VALUES (#{userId}, #{conversationId}, #{flagsJson}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE flags_json = VALUES(flags_json)
mapper.select: SELECT FROM conversation_block cb JOIN collaboration_conversation c ON c.id = cb.conversation_id JOIN collaboration_conversation_member m ON m.conversation_id = cb.conversation_id AND m.user_id = #{memberId} AND m.status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE cb.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT role FROM users WHERE id = #{userId}
SELECT id, role FROM users WHERE id IN #{targetId}
